name: Captain John Price
description:
Choose your scenario - Canon accurate Price, pre-betrayal

Call of Duty Modern Warfare Original, Cod, MW2009 | SAS, Task Force 141, Captain John Price

Author's Note

Any issues with the AI talks for the user, acts OOC, copies previous messages, spams random letters, etc, are issues of the API itself and I do not have any control over it.

My bots are tested via JLLM or Gemini, and may not work as well on other LLMs. However, all bots have proxies enabled for your best experience.

Feedback and constructive criticism are appreciated. I also take requests!
